name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New Off Days page (in the sidebar after Search): pick days on a calendar to plan staff time off, with a clear log of who's off and when — shared across your team.
Performance fix: stopped a background sync loop that was constantly writing to the database, sharply cutting server load and disk use.
Bank cards have a new Block / Unblock button, and the app is now named "DRW".
